chapters.text: Paul, Silvanus, chule Timothy’n, i-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa a um Thessalonica Houbung mite hengah:
Pa Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa a konin nahenguva lungsetna le lungmonna umhen.
Sopiteho, natahsanu hakhana akhantouva chule nangho khat le khat kingailutna aletsettah jeh hin, nangho chung changa Pathen kathangvah dingu hi kabol ding dolu ahi, kakin mongu ahi.
Hichea chun nanghon bolsetna le bol-hesohna nathoh chengseuva nathoh hatnau le natahsanjeh-u chun, keihon Pathen Houbung ho chengsea nangho paopin kaneiyui.
Pathen gam jeh-a nangho hesoh genthei nathoh-u ahin, ajeh-a nathoh-u chuche gama dinga chu lom ahi, tia dihtah a Pathenin thu atan ding chu, akiphotna hiche nathoh hatnau le natahsanu chu ahi.
Pathena dinga thil dihtah mong ahi:
Pakai Jesu thahat loupina Vantil chengsetoh meikonga vana kona ahung kilah-a,

Pathen helouhole i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa thupha joplou chengse chunga phu alah tengle, naphu u alah-a nabol hesohho chengseu chu, abol hesoh-a hesoh thoh a nangho chu keiho chengse toh ol eipeh dingu chu;
hiche ni chule ama amithengtea loupi dingle, atahsanho chengsea @9(Keiho thu hettohsah natahsanu ahitan)@7 kidang tah a choiatna um dinga ahung tengle,
Pakai ang sunga konle athahat aloupia kona amaho chun tonsot manthahna talen athohgim dingu ahi.

Hiche jeh chun keihon nangho hiche hi kataopeh jingui, chutia chu i-Pathen un nangho nakikounau toh kilom ahi, tia ataiya chule phatnomna jouse le tahsan natohho jouse athahat athilbol theina a alolhinsah theina dingin;
chule i-Pathenu le i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa milungsetna dungjuiya, i-Pakaiyu Jesu min chu nanghoa choiat loupia auma, chule nangho jong ama a choiat loupia naum theina dingu, katiu ahi.
Sopiteho, i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa hung ding le ama koma ikikhop dingu thudola hichea hi nahenguva kahung tao ahi,

lhagao khattou sei ahiloule, keiho sei hi ahi, tia thu kiseiya konin hijongle, keiho sut hi ahi, tia kei lekhathot khattou ahima kon hijongle, lunglinglao loi hih un; Pakai nikho chu ahung lhunga ahitai, ti gel loujenun; lung jong lunggim hih helun.
Koima imachan kilhep lhah sah hih un; ajeh chu lhahmangna hung lhung masa ding, chule dan susea chonsepa, mangthah chapa chu, hung kiphongdoh ding,
ama chun dou apat ding, Pathen minpu jouse le hou jouse chunga ama kichoi sanga, Pathen hou-in sana jong hung touva hung kipathen sah ding ahinalaiye.
Nakomuva kaum laiya hiti thuho kasei jouse chu nageldoh louvuham?
Chule ama chu ama phattah a akiphondoh ding, ipin akham ahi nanghon naheuve.
Ajeh chu dan suhsetna thuguh chun tua jong hi na atoh jingsa ahi; lahmanga a um kahsea hi atuh tanga khat uma ahibouve.
Chule hiche teng chule dan susea chu hung kiphongdoh ding ahi; ahinla Pakai Jesun akam hua ama chu atha a chule ama hung kilah a chu asuhmang ding ahi.
Hichepa hung chu satan natoh dungjuiya thilbolthei thahat le melchihna chule jouthil kidang bol chengse toh hung kitho ding ahi,
chule amangthah ho chengse chu chonphat louna jousea duha lhep lhah a um ahiuve; hichu amahon huhhinga aumna dinguva, ngailutna thutah chu alah lou jeh-u ahi.
Chule hichena dinga hi Pathenin amaho chunga chu suhkhel lamvaina natoh alhunsah ahi; chutia chu amahon thujou chu atahsan dingu;
thutah tahsan louva chonset alunglam hijoho jouse thu kitan ding ahi.

Amavang, Pakai ngailut sopiteho, nangho chungchanga imatih chana Pathen thangvah hi kakinu kabol ding dolu ahi; ajeh chu Lhagaova kona thenna chule thutah chu tahsan vanga atil abula pat Pathenin huhhinga um dinga nangho nalhenu ahi;
chule chuche lung ngaitoa chu i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa loupina chu chang thei dinga kathuhilu Kipana Thupha a nakouvu ahi.
Hijeh chun, sopiteho, pangdet jingun, kathuseiyu hijongle, lekha thot hijongle, kahilna chengseu hi abonchan tuhdet jingun.
Tun i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa amatah in, chule eingailua tonsot lungmonna le kinepna phatah lungset tah-a eipea, Pa Pathen chun nalungu monsah hen,
chule thilpha bolna lam jousea le thupha seiyah phutdet jingun. Keiho din neitao peh-un
Ajona-in, sopiteho, nangho lah a banga chu Pathen thu gangtah a achal a aloupidohna dingin,
michonse ho le migilou ho khut’a kona kasochat theina dingun, keiho dingin neitaopeh jiuvin; ajeh chu koiyakai jousen ginchatna aneipoi.
Ahivangin Pakai chu ginchat umtah ahi; amatah chun naphudet dingu chule agilouva kona chu nahuhdoh dingu ahi.
Chule kathupeh chengseu chu nanit jingui chule nit jong nit jing unate, ti Pakaiyah nangho thudol ginchat kaneiyui,
Chule Pakai chun nalungu Pathen ngailutna lama le Christa thohhatna lama kaihoi hen.
Sopite, i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa mina nangho hiche thu hi kapeh nahiuve, sopi koi hile dan ngailouva chona, chule keihoa kona nakihilnau banga chon lou chu kivoppi hih-un.
Nanghon keiho umchan natho dingu adol ahi chu nanghon nakihet nauve; ajeh chu keiho nangho lah-a dan ngailouvin kachon pouve;
chule a man beiyin koimacha an kanepouvin ahi, ahin nangho koima chunga pohgih pohsah louna dingin, sun le janin katonggim un ponthotah-in na katongun ahi;
hichu kahi thei lou jeh-u ahipoi; nanghon keiho umchan nathona dingu, nangho anga vettoh-a tho dinga kachuti chonu ahi.
Natong nom lou chun an jong nehdahen, tia nalah uva kaum laiya nangho thu kapehsa nahiuve.
Ajeh chu nangho lah a abang khat dan ngailouvin achonun, natong louvin mitoh sinmon avahlen ahi, ti kajauve.
Hitobang mi chu Pakai Jesu Christa mina thu kapeh a katil nahiuve, thipkhenchan na tonghen lang ama an kineh hen.
Sopiteho, nangho vang thilpha bol chimtih nei hih un.
Chule hiche kalekha thot sunga kisun keiho thu ngailou chu nanghon ama chu melgelun, ama chu kivoppi kiloipi dauvin, ajachatna dingin;
ahivangin melmah lungin gel hih un; sopi tin tilkhou jovin.
Tun cham le lungmon konna Pakai amatah-in ima jousea nangho cham le lungmon pe jingun. Pakai chun nabonchauvin umpi jingun.
Kasalam na hiche lekha hi keima Paul’in kakhut tah-a kasut ahi; lekha thot jouse amelchihna ahi, hitia hi kasutji ahi.
I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa milungset chun nabonchauvin umpi jingun.
